items.title: Greetings and Introductions
items.prompt: Practice greeting someone and introducing yourself in English.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'How are you?', and 'My name is...'.
items.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 英語で誰かに挨拶して自己紹介してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 用英文練習向別人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' 的句子。
zh.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

items.title: Asking and Answering About Objects
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What is this?' and 'What is that?'.
items.hint: Use simple sentences like 'It's a book.' or 'It's a pencil.'.
items.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

ja.prompt: 'What is this?' と 'What is that?' を使って物について質問し答えてください。
ja.hint: 'It's a book.' や 'It's a pencil.' のような簡単な文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

zh.prompt: 用 'What is this?' 和 'What is that?' 問物品並回答。
zh.hint: 使用簡單句子如 'It's a book.' 或 'It's a pencil.'。
zh.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

items.title: Talking About Daily Routines
items.prompt: Describe your daily routine including what time you get up and go to school.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I get up at six.' and 'I go to school at seven thirty.'.
items.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

ja.prompt: 起きる時間や学校に行く時間など、日常のルーティンを説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I get up at six.' や 'I go to school at seven thirty.' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

zh.prompt: 描述你的日常生活，包括你幾點起床和幾點去學校。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I get up at six.' 和 'I go to school at seven thirty.' 的句子。
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six. I go to school at seven thirty.

items.title: Talking About Possessions
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about ownership using 'Whose bike is this?' and 'It's Mike's.'.
items.hint: Use possessive forms like 'Mike's bike' and short answers.
items.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's. Is this your bike? Yes, it's mine.

ja.prompt: 'Whose bike is this?' と 'It's Mike's.' を使って所有について質問し答えてください。
ja.hint: 所有格の形 'Mike's bike' や短い答えを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's. Is this your bike? Yes, it's mine.

zh.prompt: 用 'Whose bike is this?' 和 'It's Mike's.' 問及回答擁有權。
zh.hint: 使用所有格如 'Mike's bike' 和簡短回答。
zh.sample: Whose bike is this? It's Mike's. Is this your bike? Yes, it's mine.

items.title: Talking About Abilities
items.prompt: Practice asking and answering about abilities using 'Can you swim?' and 'Yes, I can.' or 'No, I can't.'.
items.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'Can you swim?' と 'Yes, I can.' または 'No, I can't.' を使って能力について質問し答えてください。
ja.hint: 'can' と 'can't' を使って能力を表現しましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Can you swim?' 和 'Yes, I can.' 或 'No, I can't.' 問答能力。
zh.hint: 使用 'can' 和 'can't' 表達能力。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

items.title: Talking About Age
items.prompt: Ask and answer about age using 'How old are you?' and 'I'm five years old.'.
items.hint: Use numbers and 'years old' to express age.
items.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

ja.prompt: 'How old are you?' と 'I'm five years old.' を使って年齢について質問し答えてください。
ja.hint: 数字と 'years old' を使って年齢を表現しましょう。
ja.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

zh.prompt: 用 'How old are you?' 和 'I'm five years old.' 問答年齡。
zh.hint: 使用數字和 'years old' 表達年齡。
zh.sample: How old are you? I'm five years old.

items.title: Talking About Likes and Dislikes
items.prompt: Practice expressing likes and dislikes using 'Do you like baseball?' and 'Yes, I do.' or 'No, I don't.'.
items.hint: Use 'like' and 'don't like' to talk about preferences.
items.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like baseball?' と 'Yes, I do.' または 'No, I don't.' を使って好き嫌いを表現してください。
ja.hint: 'like' と 'don't like' を使って好みを話しましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Do you like baseball?' 和 'Yes, I do.' 或 'No, I don't.' 表達喜好。
zh.hint: 使用 'like' 和 'don't like' 談論偏好。
zh.sample: Do you like baseball? No, I don't. I like soccer.

items.title: Talking About Food and Preferences
items.prompt: Ask and answer about food preferences using 'Do you like cheese?' and 'Yes, I do.' or 'No, I don't.'.
items.hint: Use simple food vocabulary and like/dislike expressions.
items.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like cheese?' と 'Yes, I do.' または 'No, I don't.' を使って食べ物の好みを質問し答えてください。
ja.hint: 簡単な食べ物の語彙と好き嫌いの表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

zh.prompt: 用 'Do you like cheese?' 和 'Yes, I do.' 或 'No, I don't.' 問答食物喜好。
zh.hint: 使用簡單食物詞彙和喜好表達。
zh.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

items.title: Asking for and Giving Directions
items.prompt: Practice asking for directions and giving simple instructions like 'Go straight and turn right.'.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Excuse me, where is...?' and directional verbs.
items.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 道を尋ねて、'Go straight and turn right.' のような簡単な指示を与える練習をしてください。
ja.hint: 'Excuse me, where is...?' や方向を示す動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 練習問路和給出簡單指示，如 'Go straight and turn right.'。
zh.hint: 使用 'Excuse me, where is...?' 和方向動詞。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where's the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

items.title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
items.prompt: Describe the weather and what clothes to wear using phrases like 'It's cold and windy.' and 'Put on your coat.'.
items.hint: Use weather adjectives and clothing verbs.
items.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

ja.prompt: 天気や着る服について、'It's cold and windy.' や 'Put on your coat.' のようなフレーズで説明してください。
ja.hint: 天気の形容詞と服に関する動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

zh.prompt: 用 'It's cold and windy.' 和 'Put on your coat.' 等句子描述天氣和穿著。
zh.hint: 使用天氣形容詞和服裝動詞。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

items.title: Talking About Health and Giving Advice
items.prompt: Practice talking about health problems and giving advice, e.g., 'I have a toothache.' and 'Don't eat too many sweets.'.
items.hint: Use simple health vocabulary and imperative sentences for advice.
items.sample: I have a toothache. Don't eat too many sweets and brush your teeth three times a day.

ja.prompt: 健康問題について話し、アドバイスを与える練習をしてください。例：'I have a toothache.' と 'Don't eat too many sweets.'
ja.hint: 簡単な健康語彙と命令文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I have a toothache. Don't eat too many sweets and brush your teeth three times a day.

zh.prompt: 練習談論健康問題並給予建議，如 'I have a toothache.' 和 'Don't eat too many sweets.'。
zh.hint: 使用簡單健康詞彙和祈使句。
zh.sample: I have a toothache. Don't eat too many sweets and brush your teeth three times a day.

items.title: Talking About Favorite Subjects and Sports
items.prompt: Discuss your favorite school subjects and sports using sentences like 'My favorite subject is PE.' and 'I like basketball.'.
items.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科やスポーツについて、'My favorite subject is PE.' や 'I like basketball.' のような文で話してください。
ja.hint: 'like' と 'favorite' を使って好みを表現しましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

zh.prompt: 用 'My favorite subject is PE.' 和 'I like basketball.' 等句子談論喜愛的科目和運動。
zh.hint: 使用 'like' 和 'favorite' 表達偏好。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like basketball. I play basketball every day.

items.title: Talking About Animals and Counting
items.prompt: Practice counting animals and naming them, e.g., 'How many bears?' 'Three bears.'
items.hint: Use numbers and animal names in plural form.
items.sample: How many bears? Three bears. How many tigers? Six tigers.

ja.prompt: 動物の数を数え、名前を言う練習をしてください。例：'How many bears?' 'Three bears.'
ja.hint: 数字と動物の複数形を使いましょう。
ja.sample: How many bears? Three bears. How many tigers? Six tigers.

zh.prompt: 練習數動物並說出名稱，如 'How many bears?' 'Three bears.'。
zh.hint: 使用數字和動物複數形式。
zh.sample: How many bears? Three bears. How many tigers? Six tigers.

items.title: Shopping and Asking Prices
items.prompt: Practice shopping dialogues asking prices and buying items, e.g., 'How much is it?' 'It's five dollars.'
items.hint: Use money amounts and polite expressions.
items.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

ja.prompt: 買い物の会話で値段を尋ねたり、商品を買ったりする練習をしてください。例：'How much is it?' 'It's five dollars.'
ja.hint: お金の額や丁寧な表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

zh.prompt: 練習購物對話，問價錢和買東西，如 'How much is it?' 'It's five dollars.'。
zh.sample: May I help you? Yes, please. How much is it? It's five dollars.

items.title: Talking About Seasons and Activities
items.prompt: Describe seasonal weather and related activities, e.g., 'It's snowing.' and 'Can you make a snowman?'.
items.hint: Use weather verbs and activity questions.
items.sample: It's snowing. Can you make a snowman? Sure, I can.

ja.prompt: 季節の天気や関連する活動について説明してください。例：'It's snowing.' と 'Can you make a snowman?'
ja.hint: 天気の動詞や活動の質問を使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's snowing. Can you make a snowman? Sure, I can.

zh.prompt: 描述季節天氣和相關活動，如 'It's snowing.' 和 'Can you make a snowman?'。
zh.hint: 使用天氣動詞和活動問題。
zh.sample: It's snowing. Can you make a snowman? Sure, I can.

items.title: Talking About Colors and Traffic Signals
items.prompt: Practice talking about colors and traffic signals using 'Red stop, green go.'
items.hint: Use color words and simple commands.
items.sample: Red stop, green go. It's green. Okay, let's go.

ja.prompt: 色や信号について、'Red stop, green go.' のように話す練習をしてください。
ja.hint: 色の言葉と簡単な命令を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Red stop, green go. It's green. Okay, let's go.

zh.prompt: 練習談論顏色和交通信號，如 'Red stop, green go.'。
zh.hint: 使用顏色詞和簡單命令。
zh.sample: Red stop, green go. It's green. Okay, let's go.

items.title: Asking for Lost Items
items.prompt: Practice asking about lost items and describing them, e.g., 'I'm looking for my little sister.'
items.hint: Use descriptive phrases about appearance and clothing.
items.sample: I'm looking for my little sister. She's wearing a pink shirt and blue pants.

ja.prompt: 失くした物について尋ね、説明する練習をしてください。例：'I'm looking for my little sister.'
ja.hint: 外見や服装についての説明を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I'm looking for my little sister. She's wearing a pink shirt and blue pants.

zh.prompt: 練習問尋失物並描述，如 'I'm looking for my little sister.'
zh.sample: I'm looking for my little sister. She's wearing a pink shirt and blue pants.

items.title: Talking About Time and Daily Schedule
items.prompt: Practice asking and telling time and daily schedules, e.g., 'What time is it?' 'It's seven o'clock.'
items.hint: Use time expressions and daily activities.
items.sample: What time is it? It's seven o'clock. Time for breakfast.

ja.prompt: 時間や日課について尋ねたり伝えたりする練習をしてください。例：'What time is it?' 'It's seven o'clock.'
ja.hint: 時間の表現や日常活動を使いましょう。
ja.sample: What time is it? It's seven o'clock. Time for breakfast.

zh.prompt: 練習問時間和說日常行程，如 'What time is it?' 'It's seven o'clock.'。
zh.hint: 使用時間表達和日常活動。
zh.sample: What time is it? It's seven o'clock. Time for breakfast.

items.title: Talking About Hobbies and Past Activities
items.prompt: Describe what you did yesterday or during vacation, e.g., 'I flew kites.' or 'I took Taekwondo lessons.'.
items.hint: Use past tense verbs and activity vocabulary.
items.sample: Yesterday, I flew kites. During vacation, I took Taekwondo lessons.

ja.prompt: 昨日や休暇中にしたことを説明してください。例：'I flew kites.' や 'I took Taekwondo lessons.'
ja.hint: 過去形の動詞と活動の語彙を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Yesterday, I flew kites. During vacation, I took Taekwondo lessons.

zh.prompt: 描述你昨天或假期做了什麼，如 'I flew kites.' 或 'I took Taekwondo lessons.'。
zh.hint: 使用過去式動詞和活動詞彙。
zh.sample: Yesterday, I flew kites. During vacation, I took Taekwondo lessons.
